name: Gauchão Brazilian Cuisine
description: Gauchão Brazilian Cuisine brings the rich, bold traditions of a Brazilian churrascaria to the heart of Somerville, Massachusetts. Named in honor of the legendary gauchos — the skilled cowboys of southern Brazil — they honor their tradition of gathering around the fire to share extraordinary meat-roasting techniques and warm hospitality.

name: Rei Da Picanha
description: Go on a Brazilian adventure in the heart of Somerville, MA while enjoying authentic Brazilian cuisine in a great atmosphere.

name: Montecristo's
description: Comfortable restaurant with outdoor patio dishing up generous portions of Mexican and El Salvadoran fare such as tacos and pupusas.

name: Rincón Mexicano
description: Chef Lorenzo Reyes serves up traditional Mexican fare such as tacos, burritos & tortas alongside a full bar and patio.

name: Maya Sol
description: Experience authentic Mexican flavors in Somerville. Join them for breakfast, lunch, or dinner.

name: Taco Loco
description: Offering counter-serve Mexican cuisine with the option to dine-in or take-out since 1994.

name: Tapatio
description: Casual restaurant dishing up pupusas, burritos, and Mexican eats, including vegetarian options.

name: Tulum Mexican Cuisine
description: Authentic Mexican food served in a vibrant ambiance. Dine in or book for your next special event.

name: La Cosecha
description: An authentic Colombian dining spot featuring empanadas, smoothies and delicious pastries.

name: Los Paisanos
description: Los Paisanos Restaurant offers exquisite Latin American cuisine in a cozy setting.

name: Los Toritos
description: Fresh meat, fruits and vegetables. Freshly baked bread, spices and other high quality products.

name: Sisters Caribbean
description: Relaxed eatery for authentic Haitian food such as beef stew and fried pork, plus Caribbean meals.

name: Mount Vernon Restaurant & Pub
description: Classic American dishes like pork chops & fried clams offered in vintage digs with old-school style.

name: Vinny's Ristorante
description: Homey spot with a bar & deli dishing up huge portions of homestyle Italian pastas & entrees.

name: Oliveira's Steakhouse
description: Casual Brazilian chophouse featuring all-you-can-eat rodízio-style meats & buffet options.

name: Creation Meat Market
description: Meat Market offering a wide selection of the best Latin American products and fresh, high-quality foods.

name: Amigos Grocery
description: Grocery, supermarket and convenience store stocking familiar Latin produce and snacks

name: Minute Market
description: Local convenience store offering quick grab items as well as lottery.

name: Royal Pizza
description: Royal Pizza Subs is your one stop shop for all delectable and delicious foods. From their bagels to their burgers, from their delicious custom made salads, to their mouthwatering paninis and sandwiches.

name: Michette
description: Renowned French bakery specializing in breakfast cookies and pastries, plus latte and cold brew.

name: Ola Café
description: Cozy Portuguese coffeehouse with pastries, breakfast sandwiches, and other comfort food.

name: Pastelaria Vitória
description: Restaurant serving Brazilian street food including pateis, coxinha, and acai bowls.

name: Casey's
description: Pizza, sandwiches & bar bites in a relaxed taproom also offering keno & weekend live music.

name: Michael's Bar
description: Great local dive featuring a pool table, darts, and well-priced drinks.

name: Mount Vernon Pub
description: A traditional American restaurant with a satisfying full menu and bar. Known for its seafood dishes for over 80 years!

name: Bairo's Liquors
description: Liquor Store

name: Joe's Liquors
description: Liquor Store

name: Sullivan Sq Liquors
description: Liquor Store

name: Curl Bar
description: Curly hair salon (dry cuts, treatments and washes) run by stylists who specialize in curly hair and offer guidance for at-home maintenance.

name: The Blessing
description: Barbershop and hair design. Walk-ins welcome.

name: Visual Hair Design
description: With 32 years of excellence, Alfredo Ribeiro and his team offer personalized haircuts in a comfortable environment. Walk-ins welcome.

name: Wally's Barber
description: Local barbershop offering the highest quality and cleanest cuts.

name: Coco Flow Style Barbers
description: Barbershop

name: DaMata Barber Shop
description: Barbershop

name: Marlon's Barbers
description: Marlon’s Barbers offers high level barber skills for every person, and makes sure all clients get the utmost respect, appreciation, and gratitude. They have a barbershop that is very clean, sanitized, and an outstanding greeting process. Marlon's Barbers will host a price level that fits the needs of each client, key products will include shampoos, hair products, combs, brushes, and creams. Customers are the top determination and emphasis of Marlon’s Barbers, because without them there is no community or business.

name: Fadil Hair Braiding
description: Local salon that crafts a variety of African braids for adults and children, plus weaves.

name: Marilene's Day Spa
description: Spa featuring laser hair removal and a selection of facials, as well as massage services.

name: Bella's Manitas Learning Center
description: A bilingual daycare center that gives your child the opportunity to enjoy and learn the Spanish language as well as academics taught in English (Math, Science, Music, Art, Social Studies and Reading).

name: Ana's Perfumes
description: Perfumerie and gift store carrying Brazilian and select American fragrances, perfumes, colognes, lingerie,and handmade soaps.

name: Eye Associates of Somerville
description: Experienced Optometrist providing dedicated and friendly eye care services.

name: Somerville Orthodontics
description: Orthodontist specializing in Invisalign and metal braces, in a modern dental facility.

name: Lang's Dental Center
description: A team of dedicated doctors and dental professionals who are here for all your short and long term dental needs with comprehensive care.

name: Smiles by Rosie
description: Smiles By Rosie Family Dentistry is a comprehensive dental practice for adults and children. Their practice is particularly designed for people with dental anxiety and who fear being judged about their teeth.  They happily welcome patients with special needs and those with mobility and/or sensory impairment.

name: Somerville Boxing Club
description: Somerville Boxing Club is a tight-knit community of boxers, trainers, and members of all ages and abilities. They offer training, conditioning, competition, and support to help their members achieve more, both in and out of the ring. Their whole-athlete approach has helped hundreds dig deep, get in shape, find their grit and reach their goals.

name: Sityodtong Muay Thai
description: Founded by Kru Mark DellaGrotte, directly appointed by the legendary Kru Yodtong, this premier training facility upholds the sacred art of Muay Thai. Since 1996, Sityodtong Boston has been a beacon for aspiring martial artists, blending traditional Muay Thai with diverse combat disciplines. Their expert certified trainers empower individuals, from beginners to world champions, forging skill and confidence.

name: Rx Strength Training
description: Weightlifting-focused gym offering boot camps, CrossFit-style classes and personal training by certified coaches.

name: Durbrow Training
description: A highly-rated group personal training and strength & conditioning gym in East Somerville. They offer an inclusive, supportive environment that blends the motivation of a group atmosphere with individualized coaching for all fitness levels. [1, 2]

name: beTone
description: An approachable hybrid of Pilates-inspired movements & strength training, delivered in a 45-minute, joyful flow that packs a serious punch.

name: Jaxon Golf
description: Fittings, alterations (grips, shafts, etc.) and lessons for golf clubs.

name: All She Wrote Books
description: An intersectional, inclusive feminist and queer bookstore that supports, celebrates, and amplifies underrepresented voices through our thoughtfully curated selection of books spanning across all genres.

name: Super Dollar Plus
description: Local dollar store and giftshop, providing the East Somerville area with all their gifting needs!

name: Lotus Xpress
description: Restaurant specializing in delicious Asian food ranging from spicy Szechuan dishes to Chinese staples like General Gao's Chicken, their menu aims to tantalize your taste buds with the best that Asia has to offer.

name: Aggies Place
description: Great local bodega offering home basics, cooking essentials, and lottery.

name: Mudflat
description: A nonprofit clay studio for students and artists of all ages and levels in metro Boston offering a dynamic artistic community, featuring classes, workshops, outreach programming and events, plus a mix of studio rentals for 36 professional clay artists.

name: New Impressions Print Studio
description: New Impressions Print Studio is a supportive artistic community that provides space and specialized equipment for artists working in the medium of printmaking.

name: Quality Graphics
description: A premier full-service print management company offering printing, t-shirt, apparel & uniform.

name: Atomik Design
description: A studio that provides the full spectrum of graphic design services—our portfolio includes web, mobile, and responsive design; print design; publishing; advertising; and production for large and small clients.

name: Embroidery by Rosa
description: Embroidery by Rosa has provided quality embroidery for 25 years. Customers recognize their ability to deliver excellent quality, complete orders on time, and provide great service and response time to questions or requests.

name: Pearl Street Tattoo
description: A body art studio offering custom, detailed tattoos in a welcoming, inclusive atmosphere

name: Glass & Mirror
description: A fully licensed and insured, complete glass and mirror company founded in 1934 serving all of New England from their office based in Somerville, MA.

name: Instant Shoe Repair
description: Instant specializes in repairing zippers on luggage and bags and shoe repair services such as stretching, resoling, and re-heeling. The store stocks secondhand items including clothing and homegoods.

name: Somerville Communications
description: Phone and tech business that sells used and refurbished phones and repairs broken phones and ipads.

name: Computer Clinic
description: Offers computer services and repair.

name: Upstate Door
description: Since 1987, Upstate Door has been designing, manufacturing, and servicing their technologically advanced, beautifully crafted, premium exterior window and door products.

name: City Line Laundromat
description: Laundromat

name: Sudzy Sal's Laundromat
description: Laundromat

name: Deano's Pasta
description: Fourth generation local pasta makers in Somerville, making artisan noodles, raviolis, and sauces since 1947. Pastas and sauces made fresh daily.

name: El Jalisco
description: A family-owned casual neighborhood Mexican restaurant and bar known for their relaxed dining experience where every guest is made to feel welcomed and at home. Featuring delicious entrees and generous portions.

name: Ravelo's Auto Sales & Repair
description: From routine maintenance, such as oil changes and tire rotations, to complex engine repairs and transmission overhauls, brakes, suspension, tires, Ravelo's Auto Repair has the expertise to handle any automotive challenge. They also offer used cars for sale

name: Somerville No Touch Car Wash
description: Car wash

name: United Divers
description: The Boston area's oldest dive shop, with over 50 years of experience in SDI and ERDI training, specializing in education, Public Safety equipment supply & servicing, and drysuit/wetsuit repair & tailoring.

name: Touched by a Rose
description: Rose is a cosmetologist with over 7 years experience specializing in hair extensions and silk presses, focusing on enhancing the natural beauty of your hair while maintaining its integrity. Whether you’re looking to add volume, length, or simply enjoy a smooth, sleek look, they are committed to providing results that make you feel your best.
